query:
-- Create preset marketplace table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS presetMarketplace (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  promptData JSON NOT NULL,
  category VARCHAR(100),
  tags TEXT,
  previewImageUrl TEXT,
  isPublic BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  likeCount INT DEFAULT 0,
  useCount INT DEFAULT 0,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_user (userId),
  INDEX idx_category (category),
  INDEX idx_public (isPublic)
);

-- Create character likes table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS characterLikes (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  personalityId INT NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_like (userId, personalityId),
  INDEX idx_user (userId),
  INDEX idx_personality (personalityId)
);

-- Create preset likes table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS presetLikes (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  presetId INT NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_like (userId, presetId),
  INDEX idx_user (userId),
  INDEX idx_preset (presetId)
);

-- Create creator follows table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS creatorFollows (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  followerId INT NOT NULL,
  creatorId INT NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_follow (followerId, creatorId),
  INDEX idx_follower (followerId),
  INDEX idx_creator (creatorId)
);
